evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the commission configuration, specifically that it is set to 60% for stylists and 40% for the salon. However, the evidence only discusses individual commission rates for stylists (70% for veterans and 50% for juniors) without any mention of the required 60/40 split. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence regarding the specified commission configuration requirement.
gaps: No evidence of commission configuration set to 60% for stylists and 40% for salon.
